expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
expectations.evidence: States: 'all automation credentials are centralized in ~/scripts/ecosystem.env'

expectations.text: Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_API_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Shows 'export NOTION_TOKEN' and explains 'the variable name is NOTION_TOKEN'

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: States: 'This file is sourced from ~/.zshrc' and shows 'source ~/scripts/ecosystem.env'

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: States: 'All keys go in ~/scripts/ecosystem.env, not directly in ~/.zshrc'

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
expectations.evidence: States: 'start with the example: cp ~/scripts/ecosystem.env.example ~/scripts/ecosystem.env' and 'shows all available variables'
